title: Carpet IGNY Addition
description: A Carpet mod (fabric-carpet) extension that contains some useful or useless functions and some functions that I want but are not included.
body:
A [Carpet Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet) (fabric-carpet) extension that contains some useful or useless functions and some functions that I want but are not included                                                                           
Under the default configuration conditions, this mod will not change any vanilla behavior at all                    
Use with carpet mod in the same Minecraft version. Use newer carpet mod versions whenever possible
For more details of the mod, see the document here https://github.com/liuyuexiaoyu1/Carpet-Igny-Addition      
For snapshot and dev builds of the mod, see the GitHub actions in the GitHub repository
